overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a lush post-apocalyptic jungle environment. The character traverses ancient stone ruins, walks along a cliff edge with waterfalls, crosses a wooden rope bridge over a turquoise bay, and continues into dense tropical jungle paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruin courtyard leading to cliff overlook

events.description: exits stone courtyard into open cliffside area with rope railing
waterfall and lava chasm become visible across the chasm

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from a ruin courtyard toward a cliff edge to survey the landscape

entered.detail: market stall with red and green striped fabric canopy and various goods underneath
weathered stone ruins with moss and vegetation growing on the surfaces
thick rope railing along the edge of a steep cliff drop
large waterfall cascading down distant cliff faces in the background
deep chasm with glowing orange lava visible at the bottom

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in an ancient stone courtyard with a merchant stall, then transitions to an open cliffside path. The character walks along a rope-lined cliff edge with views of a dramatic chasm containing lava flows and a distant waterfall cascading down jungle-covered cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside promenade with rope railing overlooking chasm

events.description: approaching wooden rope bridge entrance with decorative tribal banners

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge rope railing, approaching a wooden suspension bridge

entered.detail: wooden posts marking the start of a rope suspension bridge
tall green and red fabric banners hanging from wooden poles
long wooden plank bridge with rope railings extending across the chasm

segments.scene_description: Walking along the cliff edge with rope railings, the character approaches a wooden suspension bridge marked by decorative tribal banners. The ancient stone courtyard falls behind as the bridge structure comes into view, with the waterfall now visible straight ahead across the chasm.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden rope suspension bridge over turquoise water

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge and begins crossing the chasm
view opens to show sandy beach and turquoise bay water below on the right

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the wooden rope bridge planks, looking down at the water and beach below

entered.detail: clear turquoise water visible below the bridge in the bay
sandy beach area along the coastline with scattered debris
tall wooden totem poles with green and white decorations at the bridge exit

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wooden rope bridge, with the planks creaking underfoot. Below, turquoise water and a sandy beach cove become visible. The cliffside and lava chasm fall behind as the character approaches the far end of the bridge marked by tribal totem poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical jungle trail with ancient overgrown ruins

events.description: exits wooden bridge onto dense jungle trail with tropical vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy jungle path surrounded by dense tropical foliage and ancient ruins

entered.detail: lush green tropical plants and ferns lining both sides of the path
stone ruins covered in vines and moss embedded in the jungle
clusters of bright purple flowers growing along the trail edge
tall palm trees rising above the jungle canopy

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the character enters a dense tropical jungle path. The trail winds through lush vegetation with ancient overgrown ruins visible through the trees. Purple flowers dot the path edges as the character continues deeper into the jungle toward distant palm trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from an ancient stone outpost across a dramatic chasm and into the heart of a dense tropical jungle. It begins in a stone courtyard with a merchant stall before moving onto a rope-lined cliffside path overlooking a deep chasm filled with lava flows and distant waterfalls. As the character advances, the stone ruins recede and the path leads onto a wooden suspension bridge adorned with tribal banners, shifting the view from the fiery depths to a serene turquoise bay and sandy cove below. The scene then transitions from the open air of the bridge toward tribal totem poles at the far end, where the environment closes in as the character steps off the planks. Finally, the open vistas give way to a winding jungle trail filled with purple flowers and overgrown ruins, leading deeper into a lush canopy of palm trees.
